title: Clarify optimizer evaluation links and expand metric sorting

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation. Scope: clarify stored-manifest best evaluation labels, remove informal eval wording from visible optimizer UI/CLI labels, and expand score/version evaluation sorting to alignment, accuracy, precision, recall, and cost without schema/API changes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented metric-aware evaluation sorting and terminology cleanup. Verified: Python optimizer results tests pass, focused dashboard Jest tests pass, score evaluations CLI help exposes precision/recall/cost sort options, and dashboard typecheck passes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: CI follow-up: dashboard full unit suite fails because Jest cannot resolve ESM-only @streamdown/* packages reached through ProcedureTask imports. Updating the existing frontend test configuration for this task before re-running CI.
